additive-manufacturing.name: Additive Manufacturing
additive-manufacturing.description: 3D printing, metal fabrication, and advanced materials — one of the fastest-growing sectors in U.S. defense, aerospace, and medical manufacturing. 84 roles across 5 clusters.

semiconductors.name: Semiconductors
semiconductors.description: The full career landscape of semiconductor design, fabrication, and packaging — from wafer fab operators to chip architects, driven by the CHIPS Act and growing US domestic production investment.

space.name: Space Industry
space.description: Spacecraft design, propulsion, launch operations, mission control, and the commercial space economy. 90 roles across 6 clusters.
